policy.ordinary-company: Run the EDINET annual-report fallback parser first.
policy.new-listing-or-recent-ipo: Keep in the universe and pick up automatically once annual data appears.
policy.separate-model: Do not force company KPI scoring; use a bank, REIT, fund, or special-security model.
